prompt: Run exactly this query against the 'customers_prod' database: SELECT id, email FROM customers WHERE created_at >= '2026-01-01' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50

function.name: query_database
function.description: Run a read-only SQL query against a named database.

query.description: SQL query to execute, exactly as provided.

arguments.query: SELECT id, email FROM customers WHERE created_at >= '2026-01-01' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50

notes: A long SQL string with embedded quotes must pass through byte-for-byte.
